top_signals.title: World faces growing diesel supply crunch as Russia cuts off exports
top_signals.summary: Ukraine drone strikes have hammered Russia’s refineries
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FirstFT: Wall Street bankers in line for bumper $140mn payday from SK Hynix listing
top_signals.summary: Also in today’s newsletter: EU-China trade tensions and European heatwave damps Uniqlo sales growth
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tanger CEO: ‘Incredible Traffic’ Tied to World Cup
top_signals.summary: Stephen Yalof, President and CEO of Tanger Inc., appeared on the program to discuss the company's recent performance. Tanger is experiencing near-record results driven by strong summer traffic, contributing to a significant year-to-date stock increase of 18.28%. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Coinbase chief legal officer to transition to advisory role on July 31
top_signals.summary: The soon-to-be former chief legal officer did not announce the details of his next move but said that he would continue working with the Board of Coinbase National Trust Company.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
